data.title: FDG Web Relocates Headquarters to Everett, Washington, Joining a Key Innovation Hub in the Pacific Northwest
data.description: FDG Web, a leading web design and application development agency, has relocated its headquarters from Arlington to Everett, Washington. This move is a pivotal moment in the company's 26-year history as it looks to broaden its presence in the Pacific Northwest and extend its reach nationwide. The new address for FDG Web is 11400 Airport Rd, Suite 218, Everett, WA 98204. The transition to Everett signifies a strategic advancement for the company as it continues to grow.

data.title: Southern First Bancshares, Inc. Announces Pricing of Public Offering of Common Stock
data.description: Today, Southern First Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: SFST) based in Greenville, S.C., disclosed the pricing details of an underwritten public offering. The Company declared the offering of 1,050,000 shares of its common stock with each share priced at $54.00.

data.title: CGTN: How cultural exchanges foster the China-Vietnam friendship
data.description: On April 15, 2026, a report highlighted the efforts of China and Vietnam in strengthening bilateral relations through cultural exchanges, artistic collaborations, tourism, and fostering friendship among their citizens. Peng Liyuan, spouse of the General Secretary of the Communist Party of China Central Committee, played a key role in these initiatives. The article, published by CGTN, shed light on the significant strides taken by both nations to enhance people-to-people connections, with a focus on promoting cultural understanding and tourism.

data.title: Arcline-Backed Arxis Announces Pricing of its Initial Public Offering
data.description: In Bloomfield, Connecticut on April 15, 2026, Arxis, Inc. (Arxis), a company owned by Arcline Investment Management and known for designing and producing specialized electronic and mechanical components, disclosed the pricing of its latest product.
